text:
(akso known as ) is an ERDA vehicle appearing in the Plarail Shinkalion CW toyline based on the Shinkalion: Change the World series.

Profile

The ERDA Positron Rifle is a self-propelled cannon developed by the Evolution Railway Development Agency based on data acquired from NERV. Its firepower is much weaker than the actual positron cannon used during the Operation Yashima battle, in exchange for the ability to move more freely as a vehicle.

It can combine with Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA (CW) to form the Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA Positron Form.

History

Development

Plarail Shinkalion CW 500 TYPE EVA Positron Form was made by TAKARA TOMY. It was released on 06 December 2025 for the asking price of ￥7,920 (Tax included). It includes the Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA (CW), ERDA Positron Rifle and Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA Positron Form. https://web.archive.org/web/20251018042429/https://www.takaratomy.co.jp/products/plarail/shinkalion/tettei/500typeeva/ 

Trivia

Its design is based on the 2nd Experimental High Power Self-Propelled 460mm Positron Cannon featured in Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone film.
